judge.reason: Primary purpose is boot device registration with the SCSI mid-layer (scsi_add_device), not reference-count management. The refcount operations (e.g., _scsih_sas_device_remove) are only error-handling steps. The function selects a boot device among several candidates, checks registration status, and adds it if not already present. This involves multiple branches, device type checks, and transport port operations — far beyond a focused get/put/set wrapper.
